before: function create(product: Product | null): void { if (!product) throw new Error('null'); if (!product.name) throw new Error('name required'); repo.add(product); } function update(product: Product | null): void { if (!product) throw new Error('null'); if (!product.name) throw new Error('name required'); repo.update(product); }
